task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login, ideally showing the user profile as 'administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the CMDB module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CMDB tab or module is open and active in the application interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Payroll Service' CI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Configuration Item (CI) named 'Payroll Service' of type 'Business Service' is visible in the CMDB list or its details page, including the description 'Core payroll processing system'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Payroll-DB-01' CI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Configuration Item (CI) named 'Payroll-DB-01' of type 'Server' is visible in the CMDB list or its details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the relationship between the two CIs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A relationship graph, map, or table explicitly shows 'Payroll Service' having a 'Depends On' relationship with 'Payroll-DB-01'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser GUI (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal windows executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual CMDB application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus (or equivalent CMDB) web application, not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the results were not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CI names and relationship map should appear naturally rendered by the application without signs of DOM manipulation, such as mismatched fonts, misaligned text, or open DevTools panels.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target CI 1: Name='Payroll Service', Type='Business Service', Description='Core payroll processing system'. Target CI 2: Name='Payroll-DB-01', Type='Server'. Required Relationship: 'Payroll Service' -> 'Depends On' -> 'Payroll-DB-01'.
